pick.rationale: Arkansas holds marginal advantages across all key metrics with a KenPom rank of 17 versus Wisconsin's 22, Torvik rank of 20 versus 21, and superior efficiency margin (+25.43 vs +23.4). Both teams feature elite offenses ranked in the top 11 nationally with nearly identical defensive ratings, making this essentially a coin-flip matchup. However, Arkansas's dynamic freshman guard duo of Darius Acuff Jr. and Meleek Thomas have demonstrated exceptional poise in high-pressure SEC Tournament play, providing momentum heading into March Madness. The SEC conference pedigree also carries slightly more weight than the Big Ten in tournament evaluations, giving Arkansas the narrow edge needed to advance.

reasoningStep.title: Wisconsin vs Arkansas Round of 32 Matchup Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Extremely close matchup with Arkansas holding slight advantages in rankings, efficiency margin, and recent tournament performance
reasoningStep.evidence: Arkansas: KenPom 17th, Torvik 20th, 25-8 record, +25.43 AdjEM, SEC; Wisconsin: KenPom 22nd, Torvik 21st, 24-10 record, +23.4 AdjEM, Big Ten. Both teams rank top 11 in offensive rating. Freshman guards Acuff Jr. and Thomas powering Arkansas through SEC Tournament.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.
